title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, April 25 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 25/04/2023
Image reference: 2023-04-25_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-april-25-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Bulker values have remained stable
Panamax Valiant Spring (81,900 DWT, Dec 2015, Tsuneishi Zhoushan) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 28.30 mil, VV Value USD 26.94 mil - BWTS. Ultramax CL Ebisu (61,300 DWT, Nov 2014, Iwagi Zosen) sold to Phoenix Bulk Carriers for USD 26.70 mil, VV Value USD 24.96 mil - BWTS. Supramax Seacon Qingdao (56,500 DWT, Mar 2013, Taizhou Sanfu Shipbuilding) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 15.67 mil, VV Value USD 15.11 mil - SS/DD Passed.
